description_long: This is a military combat tactical vehicle resembling a medium tank, featuring a rotating turret with a prominent main cannon and a secondary coaxial machine gun. The hull and turret are covered in angular, sloped armor plating, providing protection across the entire body. The vehicle is painted in a green and black camouflage pattern with irregular, jagged shapes, and displays a small roundel insignia on the turret sides. The tank is equipped with continuous track systems on both sides, supported by multiple road wheels and a visible suspension system. Additional features include a cylindrical exhaust on the right side, antennae, and storage compartments on the rear deck. The overall design is robust, with a low profile and functional details typical of armored fighting vehicles.
description: A camouflaged, armored combat vehicle with a rotating turret, main cannon, and continuous tracks, featuring sloped armor and military insignia.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main cannon, sloped frontal armor, and the tank's wide tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the turret, side-mounted exhaust, and the roundel insignia on the turret.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine deck, rear armor, and the cylindrical exhaust on the right.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible turret details, antenna, and the roundel insignia.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon and one coaxial machine gun mounted on the turret; no other visible mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped, angular steel armor plating; appears thick and robust, especially on the front and turret.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage with irregular green, black, and beige jagged shapes.
attribute_military_markings: Small roundel insignia on both sides of the turret; no other visible markings.
